final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing brand identity presentation for "染秋 (RAN QIU)".

Style/medium: needs an Eastern aesthetic with autumn warmth — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include a three-section layout showing: primary color / secondary color / typography specifications
Subject: must include the brand name "染秋" and "RAN QIU" as the core identity element
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a warm, poetic autumn atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn-inspired direction — exact hex values are yours (informed by osmanthus, persimmon, maple leaf, amber, sandalwood)
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" and "RAN QIU" in the typography section; must include color labels for primary and secondary colors
Constraints: must preserve the brand philosophy of Eastern philosophy and seasonal transition; must reflect autumn botanicals (桂花, 柿子, 枫叶, 乌龙茶, 肉桂, 檀香, 琥珀)
Avoid:
